descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Pembroke Lumber Kings 4-1 in Centennial Cup round-robin play in Humboldt, Saskatchewan.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes, British Columbia champions, defeated the Ontario-representing Pembroke Lumber Kings 4-1 Monday night in the Centennial Cup junior-A championship tournament in Humboldt, Saskatchewan. The Sockeyes scored three goals in the third period to improve to 2-0 in round-robin play, tying the Humboldt Broncos for first place. The Lumber Kings suffered their second consecutive loss, while the Dartmouth Fuel Kids remained winless at 0-2.
